name: Ham and Pea Spoonbread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup SARGENTO Classic Sharp Cheddar Cheese, shredded or diced
15 ounces canned LESSONER Very Young Small Peas, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 12 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish; sprinkle the bottom with 1 tablespoon cornmeal. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine the remaining 1 cup cornmeal and sugar, salt, and red pepper flakes. Stir until well mixed.
3. Heat milk in a large saucepan over medium heat until it reaches boiling point.
4. Gradually add the cornmeal mixture to the boiling milk, stirring constantly with a wire whisk until smooth.
5. Cook the mixture on low heat until thickened, stirring continuously. Remove from heat and stir in the cheese and butter until melted.
6. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before adding the egg yolks. Beat until blended.
7. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff but not dry. Gently fold the egg whites into the cornmeal mixture.
8. Fold in the diced ham and peas.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes or until puffed and lightly browned.
10. Serve immediately. Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
